title: Marriott (MAR) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's Why
text: Marriott (MAR) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

title: 5 Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Buy Ahead of Q1 Earnings
text: We have narrowed our search to five consumer discretionary stocks that are set to report first-quarter 2023 earnings results. These are: CHDN, CROX, GOLF, MAR and SIX.

title: First 19 Development Projects Announced Under Marriott's Bridging the Gap Program
text: Initiative Designed to Increase Hotel Development and Ownership Among Historically Underrepresented Groups Company to Also Host "She Has a Deal" Pitch Competition and Awards Luncheon  April 27-28 BETHESDA, Md. , April 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As part of Marriott International's (Nasdaq: MAR) ongoing commitment to diversity, equity and inclusion, the company today announced that the first 19 projects receiving financial support and other incentives through "Marriott's Bridging the Gap" program will include the company's Aloft Hotels, Autograph Collection, Fairfield Inn & Suites, Residence Inn, SpringHill Suites, TownePlace Suites and Tribute Portfolio brands.

title: Marriott (MAR) to Boost Presence in India With Over 100 Hotels

title: Marriott International: Continued China Expansion Provides Growth Opportunity
text: Marriott International is set to see significant expansion of its Ritz-Carlton and W Hotels brands in China this year. The stock looks attractively priced from an earnings standpoint.

title: 5 Leisure and Lodging Stocks Gurus Are Traveling With
text: According to the Aggregated Portfolio of Gurus, a Premium feature of GuruFocus based on 13F equity portfolio filings, five leisure and lodging stocks broadly owned by gurus include Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. ( HLT , Financial), Marriott International Inc. ( MAR , Financial), H World Group Ltd. ( HTHT , Financial), Vista Outdoor Inc. ( VSTO , Financial) and Johnson Outdoors Inc. ( JOUT , Financial).

title: Marriott International Launches New People Brand "Be" to Grow and Empower Global Workforce
text: For 26th Year in a Row, Marriott Named One of Fortune's 100 Best Companies to Work For®    BETHESDA, Md. , April 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR) announced it is launching its new people brand, "Be," as the company continues its focus on attracting and retaining top talent around the world.
